title: Sabo Meets Luffy Again
description: Pages 1–5 focus on sabo meets luffy again, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Bartolomeo as luffy meets Sabo again, entrusts him with the Colosseum fight, and the operation against Doflamingo moves forward.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Move aside...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I have to finish Bellamy off...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Get out of my way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I'm not going to do that.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: This is our family business!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're so noisy... Didn't you just get a new mission on the Den Den mush!!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: I won't get rid of the barrier!!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: ...Damn barrier guy....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You haven't taken out the trash bellamy yet--

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Forget it, leave him for now, the following is also an order from Doflamingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: go with Lao-G and them to protect the "toy house"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Immedi- Ately!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You two, remember this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Don't even think about getting off Dressrosa alive!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hahaha!! Just get out of here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Diamante... It's a real order...!? Doflamingo 'personally ordered it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: For him to kill me.....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: As long as I win in the Tourna- ment...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Then I can become an agent of the family!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: That's right.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Alright, go do your best, I look forward to seeing your performance.

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: I'll take you to the medical room.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Mind your own business...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: I already have nothing to live for...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Be Frank... What is your reason for saving me...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: All we did was fight together in the same arena for a while...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: So what!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Men who have fought together are 'comrades'!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Even if I were scum,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: I wouldn't let a friend die without helping!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Under- Ground Riku Army HQ.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: So that's the situa- lion in this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: and this operati- on that will com- plenty overturn the darkness of this tragedy,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: I have named...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Whoa!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: SOP!!? There must be some huge hidden meaning behind this codename!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: In this coun- try, there is a secret under- ground world, that nobody knows of

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: The trade port, where illegal business is trans- acted, and the MYS- tenious factory are all hidden.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Factory & trade port

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: in this under- ground world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: The meaning of SOP is!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: The captured Contatta and those turned into toys,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: secretly infiltrate via tunnel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: are forced to work tire- lessly here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: ? ( i) a

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: And we are going to infilitate through...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: A underground tunnel we spent a year digging and rescue them all!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Then we'll destroy the factory and the port and all the facilities, and then beat the dofla- mingo family.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Lastly, the rule of Dressrosa will be returned to King Riku!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: This is the goal of this operation!!

summary: Sabo Meets Luffy Again focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as luffy meets Sabo again, entrusts him with the Colosseum fight, and the operation against Doflamingo moves forward.
